haiku:
Grapes burst with sweet juice,
Sunset hues in crystal glass,
Laughter fills the air.
Happy #NationalWineDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Wooden floors resound,
Feet fly like whispers of joy,
Rhythms twirl and leap.
Happy #NationalTapDanceDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Flags wave in the breeze,
Laughter dances on warm air,
Sunshine hugs the day.
Happy #MemorialDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Whispers of the woods,
Nature sings in soft sunlight,
Ralph's thoughts dance like leaves.
#HappyBirthdayRalphWaldoEmerson from @ClamBakeSanta

Grapes freeze in the sun,
Violet dreams on my tongue,
Chilled bliss, laughter hums.
Happy #NationalGrapePopsicleDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunlight warms my skin,
Gentle waves embrace the shore,
Laughter fills the air.
Happy #SunScreenDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Whispers in the leaves,
Nature's voice sings to us all,
Life's dance in the breeze.
#HappyBirthdayRachelCarson from @ClamBakeSanta

Smoky scents arise,
Tender brisket, spice embraced,
Feast of warmth and cheer.
Happy #NationalBrisketDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Grilled patties sizzle,
Golden buns embrace the warmth,
Ketchup rivers flow.
Happy #NationalHamburgerDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden sunbeams glow,
Crisp leaves dance on warm breezes,
Cheers rise, hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayIanFleming from @ClamBakeSanta

Rich red wine simmers,
Tender chicken cradled warm,
Herbs dance in the pot.
Happy #NationalCoqAuVinDay from @ClamBakeSanta

theme: Put a Pillow on Your Fridge Day
haiku:
Soft fabric on ice,

Whispers of delight.

Candles flicker, dreams take flight,
Laughter warms the night.
#HappyBirthdayJohnFKennedy from @ClamBakeSanta

Mint leaves dance with sun,

Cheers rise, joy abounds.
Happy #NationalMintJulepDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colors splash and twirl,
Brushes dance on canvas bright,
Dreams ignite the heart.
Happy #NationalCreativityDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright notes fill the room,

Joyful hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayBennyGoodman from @ClamBakeSanta

Sweet cake smiles abound.
#HappyBirthdayMelBlanc from @ClamBakeSanta

Fresh blooms greet the dawn,

Joyful hearts unite.
Happy #WorldNoTobaccoDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages turn with joy and light,
Nature's cheer takes flight.
#HappyBirthdayWaltWhitman from @ClamBakeSanta

Night wraps us in peace.
Happy #FullMoon from @ClamBakeSanta
